name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_Supplier
title: R5: An entity that is the source for the substance. It may be different from the manufacturer (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.supplier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.supplier` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.supplier` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.supplier` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.supplier` has a context of SubstanceSpecification based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.supplier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: An entity that is the source for the substance. It may be different from the manufacturer (new)

element.short: An entity that is the source for the substance. It may be different from the manufacturer
element.definition: An entity that is the source for the substance. It may be different from the manufacturer. Supplier is synonymous to a distributor.
